keysModule.title: Key system
keysModule.subtitle: Live Tarkov key and keycard search with separate PVP/PVE prices and a tactical layer for highlighting the most important keys.
keysModule.searchPlaceholder: Search any key, keycard, quest, map or tag...

defaults.use: Key detected from the tarkov.dev database. Check its wiki page for exact location, doors and related loot.
defaults.recommendation: This key is not marked as tactical priority. Look for it if a quest, loot route or barter requires it.

dorm206.use: Opens room 206 to locate the hidden water.
dorm206.recommendation: Keep it until the quest is complete. This is a very important early-wipe key.

machinery.use: Opens the truck where the bronze pocket watch is collected.
machinery.recommendation: Absolute priority at the start of a wipe. If you do not have it, check the fixed jacket in three-story Dorms.

dorm114.use: Opens room 114 to recover Carbon's case.
dorm114.recommendation: Keep it for the quest. Afterwards it can still be useful for the safe and medical loot.

factoryExit.use: Unlocks key extracts and shortcuts in Factory and Customs.
factoryExit.recommendation: Always buy or keep it. It is a high-impact utility key for survival.

resortWest216.use: Grants access to a room required for Therapist progression.
resortWest216.recommendation: Keep it until the chain is complete. Shoreline progression has a lot of key gates.

resortWest220.use: One of the keys used to reach the resort generator.
resortWest220.recommendation: Keep it if you are progressing Peacekeeper. It may be replaceable depending on your route or available keys.

cottageBackDoor.use: Lets you enter the locked cottage for quest objectives.
cottageBackDoor.recommendation: Very worth keeping. It can block progression if it does not appear on flea at a reasonable price.

rbSt.use: Opens an important Reserve room for objectives and technical/military loot.
rbSt.recommendation: Keep it if you find it. It often has high value due to its quest and loot combination.

rbKprl.use: Access to a room with intel, containers and consistent value potential.
rbKprl.recommendation: Good for Reserve loot routes, but not a priority if you are only questing.

emercomMedical.use: Opens the medical unit required for questing and medical loot.
emercomMedical.recommendation: Keep it for Therapist/Skier and bring it when entering Interchange with a medical objective.

oliLogistics.use: Lets you access quest documents inside OLI.
oliLogistics.recommendation: Progression key. Keep it until the Ragman routes on Interchange are complete.

zb014.use: Opens the bunker and conditional extract with useful loot.
zb014.recommendation: Keep it. It usually is not too expensive and helps both questing and survival.

operatingRoom.use: Access to a room with medical and technical loot.
operatingRoom.recommendation: Interesting if you play Lighthouse regularly. Not a priority for newer players.

conferenceRoom.use: Access to an interior location used in Streets progression.
conferenceRoom.recommendation: Buy only when you have the quest or a clear Streets route.

dorm314Marked.use: Opens the Customs marked room with variable high-value loot.
dorm314Marked.recommendation: Not a beginner key. Evaluate price, remaining uses and Dorms risk.

labsKeycard.use: Access to Labs or special laboratory areas depending on the card.
labsKeycard.recommendation: Powerful, but not a priority for general progression. Requires economy and Labs experience.

status.noKeys: No keys were detected in tarkov.dev. Showing the local tactical layer.
status.connectionError: Could not connect to tarkov.dev. Showing locally saved important keys.

questOptimizer.title: Quest Optimizer
questOptimizer.subtitle: Analyzes pending quests, maps, Kappa and recommended keys to suggest where your next raid has the best value.
questOptimizer.dynamicReason: Groups pending quests detected per map from tarkov.dev.
questOptimizer.noCriticalKeys: No critical keys detected for this route
questOptimizer.empty: No routes are available with these filters. Try disabling Kappa or changing map.

status.connectionError: Could not connect to tarkov.dev. Showing base recommendations.

customs.reason: Early map with many Prapor, Therapist and Skier chains.

shoreline.reason: Strong concentration of resort quests and Peacekeeper/Therapist progression.

interchange.reason: Good map for Ragman, hideout items and store routes.

risks.customs: High around Dorms, construction and gas station
risks.reserve: High due to raiders, bunker and loot runners
risks.interchange: Medium/high around KIBA, tech stores and extracts
risks.woods: Medium, dangerous long sightlines and bosses
risks.lighthouse: High around water treatment and chalets
risks.streets: High due to player density and indoor routes
risks.labs: Very high, raiders and endgame players

armorModule.title: ARMOR TTK SIMULATOR

armorModule.resultDescription: Number of thorax impacts required to neutralize the target under sustained fire.

mapsModule.title: TACTICAL CARTOGRAPHY

about.title: About Info Tarkov
about.subtitle: Complete summary of the purpose, scope, architecture and technologies behind the app.

sections.title: What Info Tarkov Is
sections.body: Info Tarkov is a modular hub for Escape From Tarkov designed as a tactical center for lookup, tracking and decisions. It gathers quest progress, bosses, events, servers, combat, planning and public PMC data in one interface.

sections.title: What You Can Do
sections.body: The app lets you consult maps, track Kappa, review decisions/endings, investigate bosses, check Goons, explore PVP/PVE prices, plan Hideout, simulate combat, review events, inspect PMC profiles and report bugs or suggestions.

sections.title: User System
sections.body: It works as guest or with an account. Guest progress is stored in the browser. With an account, Supabase stores Tarkov username, main mode and cloud progress separated for PVP and PVE.

sections.title: Admin Panel
sections.body: The app includes an admin-only panel for metrics, users, roles, tickets, activity and administrative actions. The owner account is protected against accidental changes.

sections.title: Communication and Support
sections.body: Report works as a ticket system between users and the developer. It keeps conversation, replies, states and notifications for both sides.

sections.title: Frontend Architecture
sections.body: The frontend is built with React and Vite. Navigation is internal from App.jsx, and each module is loaded with React.lazy and Suspense to reduce initial weight.

sections.title: Backend and Persistence
sections.body: The backend uses Supabase, PostgreSQL, Supabase Auth and Row Level Security. The app combines guest localStorage with cloud persistence when a session exists.

sections.title: Main Technologies
sections.body: React, Vite, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Auth, RLS, localStorage, i18next, react-i18next, Netlify, GitHub and Tarkov-related external APIs.

sections.title: Current State
sections.body: The project already includes auth, roles, admin panel, tickets, lazy loading, ES/EN multilingual base, PVP/PVE preference and a hybrid layer in missions, Goons, flea, keys, hideout and PMC Profile. Prestige is marked PVP ONLY.

moduleDetails.status: Connected through static JSON with search, achievements, skills and PNG export.

astur.subtitle: Info Tarkov started as a personal tool to centralize real intelligence, progress and utility inside Escape From Tarkov. If you want to follow development, suggest ideas or join the community, these are my socials.

links.twitch: Streams, Tarkov, community and project updates.
links.x: Quick updates, ideas and direct communication.
links.instagram: Personal content, clips and social presence.

troubleshooting.title: KNOWN ERROR LOG
troubleshooting.subtitle: Known app anomalies and available workarounds. Fixes are still being worked through.

incidents.title: Search Match Isolation
incidents.symptom: When searching shared terms in Missions / Kappa, such as "Crisis", the app filters correctly but may first expose only one visible match inside the active trader.
incidents.fix: If you are searching for a quest with a common or shared name, type the word in the search box and review the different trader tabs to see all matches.

incidents.title: Local Progress in Guest Mode
incidents.symptom: If you use the app without logging in, quest progress is saved in localStorage. It can be lost after clearing browser data, using aggressive cleanup, incognito mode or switching device.
incidents.fix: Create an account and log in to save progress in Supabase. Guest mode still works, but it should not be treated as permanent persistence.

incidents.title: External API Dependency
incidents.symptom: Server status, live events, Goons Tracker, Flea Market and some Kappa data depend on external sources. If an API, proxy or external site fails, the module may show empty data, old data or a temporary error.
incidents.fix: Try again after a few minutes and check your connection. Live Events includes a manual fallback when automatic sources do not respond.

incidents.title: Goons Tracker Reading
incidents.symptom: Goons Tracker extracts information from external HTML. If the source site changes its structure, the app may not detect the active map correctly.
incidents.fix: If a capture error appears or the map does not look reliable, validate the data with the original source until the parser is updated.

incidents.title: Partial Interface Translation
incidents.symptom: The ES/EN selector now covers home, login, account, Report, Server Status, Missions / Kappa, PMC Profile, Flea, Hideout, Bosses, Events, Prestige, Key System, Quest Optimizer, Goons, Maps, About and Ballistics Simulator. Some internal text or content data may still remain in larger modules.
incidents.fix: Translation is being rolled out module by module. Dossier is excluded because it is private project documentation. Current priority: internal data, Admin Panel and remaining dynamic content.

incidents.title: PMC Profile and Public Index
incidents.symptom: PMC Profile depends on public players.tarkov.dev JSON files. Only players already viewed on tarkov.dev/players and present in the public index can appear, and that index updates roughly once per day.
incidents.fix: If a player does not appear, open their profile on tarkov.dev/players first and wait for the next index update. The app avoids the Turnstile-protected search and only uses available public JSON files.

incidents.title: Experimental Live Events
incidents.symptom: Live Events depends on external feeds that are not always complete or up to date. It may miss active events even when the community knows they are running.
incidents.fix: Treat the module as an experimental reference. It is kept with manual fallback and separated sources, but may be hidden or replaced by a more reliable source in a future version.

incidents.title: Bundle Size Warning
incidents.symptom: The production build passes, but Vite warns about large chunks due to the accumulated size of the app, assets and implemented modules.
incidents.fix: It does not block production. Main modules already use lazy loading; before 1.0, heavy assets and extra splitting should be reviewed if real performance requires it.

bossesModule.title: INTEL: BOSSES
bossesModule.subtitle: Critical intelligence for every boss in the game.

plan.expectedAmmo: Expected ammunition: {{ammo}}. Enter with real cover and a clear exit.

veryHard.line1: Do not cross open sightlines without prior information.
veryHard.line2: Use optics, range and cover; assuming a frontal fight is usually fatal.

hard.line1: Clear guards or secondary angles before pushing.
hard.line2: Grenades and repositioning are worth more than trading face to face.

medium.line1: Isolate the target and cut off push routes.
medium.line2: Do not stay still after the first shot; reposition and force another angle.

bigpipe.guards: Accompanied by Knight and Birdeye (The Goons)
bigpipe.visuals: Massive build, extensive tattoos and his signature mechanical pipe.
bigpipe.behavior: Extremely aggressive. Pushes and flanks at close range while Knight applies pressure.
bigpipe.weaknesses: Unprotected head, no heavy helmet, and exposed joints.
bigpipe.loot: MGL grenade launcher, Pipe's special backpack and high-priority keys.

birdeye.guards: Accompanied by Knight and Big Pipe (The Goons)
birdeye.visuals: Light camouflage equipment and advanced tactical headset.
birdeye.behavior: Silent marksman. Repositions constantly and his footsteps are barely audible.
birdeye.weaknesses: Exposed torso and limbs; lacks sustained heavy armor.
birdeye.loot: Modified bolt-action rifle, access cards and premium military ammunition.

glukhar.visuals: Russian urban camouflage uniform, robust build and no helmet.
glukhar.behavior: Strategic and defensive. His guards split into assault, scout and marksman roles.
glukhar.weaknesses: Head shots, especially if isolated from his assault guards.
glukhar.loot: Reserve military keys, FIR ASH-12 and high-capacity magazines.

kaban.guards: Large group of armored guards and static snipers
kaban.visuals: Huge frame, heavy civilian clothing and entrenched position in the car dealership.
kaban.behavior: Static but lethal. Uses mounted heavy machine guns and relentless sustained fire.
kaban.weaknesses: Extremely limited mobility; vulnerable to flanks and grenades.
kaban.loot: PKP/PKM machine gun, Streets keys and full ammunition cases.

killa.visuals: Black tracksuit with three stripes, 6B13 armor and Maska helmet with visor.
killa.behavior: Relentless hunter. Runs toward footstep audio and fires long bursts.
killa.weaknesses: Side blind spots, back of the head and legs.
killa.loot: Maska-1Sch helmet and level 5 Killa polyethylene body armor.

knight.guards: Leader of the trio, accompanied by Big Pipe and Birdeye
knight.visuals: Ballistic skull mask and modular assault plate carrier.
knight.behavior: Spearhead operator. Detects targets at extreme range and starts lethal pursuits.
knight.weaknesses: Ballistic mask visor and lower limbs.
knight.loot: Skull mask, assault plate carrier and advanced stimulants.

kollontay.guards: 3 to 5 guards with Russian police equipment
kollontay.visuals: Former military police uniform, officer cap and riot baton.
kollontay.behavior: Psychological pressure. If he gets too close, he uses the baton and can force weapon blocking.
kollontay.weaknesses: Side torso angles; vulnerable while sprinting in with the baton.
kollontay.loot: Unique Kollontay baton, Streets police station keys and police equipment.

partisan.visuals: Worn woodland camouflage, thick beard and large tactical backpack.
partisan.behavior: Hostile trapper. Places tripwire grenades and stalks from vegetation.
partisan.weaknesses: Easy to drop in open terrain if his traps are detected before contact.
partisan.loot: Tripwire kit, collector AKM and smuggler dogtags.

reshala.visuals: Brown leather jacket with gold patterns and no visible armor.
reshala.behavior: Cowardly and evasive. Hides while his guards assault and secure the area.
reshala.weaknesses: Torso and head; he has no native body armor.
reshala.loot: Collector golden TT pistol, Customs office key and bitcoins.

sanitar.visuals: Blue medical coat over civilian clothing and a surgical kit bag.
sanitar.behavior: Dynamic support. Constantly heals and buffs his guards during combat.
sanitar.weaknesses: Unprotected head and animation windows while injecting stimulants.
sanitar.loot: Medical case with rare stimulants, Ophthalmoscope, LedX and syringes.

shturman.visuals: Winter coat with fur hood, exposed face and strong sawmill control.
shturman.behavior: Zone sniper. Shoots at extreme distances with calculated cadence.
shturman.weaknesses: Head and limbs without rigid ballistic armor.
shturman.loot: Shturman's stash key, modified SVDS and red access cards.

tagilla.visuals: Low welding trousers, tattooed torso and heavy welding mask.
tagilla.behavior: Relentless close-range assault. Chases with the sledgehammer and forces close combat.
tagilla.weaknesses: Exposed back and legs with high flesh-damage vulnerability.
tagilla.loot: Level 5 welding mask, Tagilla's rigid plate carrier and sledgehammer.

Zryachiy.guards: 2 support snipers hidden on the island slopes
Zryachiy.visuals: White balaclava with stitched pattern and optic mounted at the eye.
Zryachiy.behavior: Absolute defensive sniper. Opens fire if you cross the bridge without an active transmitter.
Zryachiy.weaknesses: Static defensive position; vulnerable if you break his initial line of sight.
Zryachiy.loot: AXMC .338 tactical rifle, collector Lapua AP ammunition and military telemetry.

wedge.guards: Black Division boss with 3 to 6 followers depending on the number of players in the raid.
wedge.visuals: Black EXFIL helmet with visor, Avon gas mask and Spiritus LV-119 plate carrier.
wedge.behavior: Elite Black Division contact in the Icebreaker level 3 gym. Treat as a coordinated squad with heavy armor and high-penetration ammunition.
wedge.weapons: HK MP7A1, FN SCAR-H, X-17, DS Arms SA-58, Desert Tech MDR, HK USP and SOG Voodoo Hawk
wedge.ammo: 4.6x30mm AP SX, 5.56x45mm M995, 7.62x51mm M993, .45 ACP AP
wedge.weaknesses: 880 health and 3-6 followers; isolate guards first and avoid exposed angles inside Icebreaker.
wedge.loot: Spiritus LV-119 plate carrier, keycard holder case, Euros, Dollars and Black Division gear.

goonsModule.title: GOONS TRACKER
goonsModule.subtitle: Goons intelligence and their latest known location.

errors.mapParse: Could not extract the active map from the tracker HTML

knight.desc: The tactical brain of the squad. Extremely aggressive, wearing his iconic skull mask, he pushes straight toward your position and flanks with relentless suppressive fire once he detects you or your squad.

bigPipe.desc: Demolitions and covering-fire specialist. Commonly carries a 40 mm M32A1 multi-shot grenade launcher or heavy machine guns, providing devastating suppression while Knight advances.

birdeye.desc: The silent sniper of the trio. His footsteps are very quiet and he opens fire from long distance.

hideoutModule.title: HIDEOUT LOGISTICS
hideoutModule.subtitle: Separate PVP/PVE costs, local material checklist, FIR warnings and station, trader and skill requirements.

storyModule.title: STORY DECISIONS
storyModule.subtitle: All routes, decisions and points of no return you should track to reach the different Tarkov story endings.
storyModule.armoredCaseQuestion: What do you do with the Armored Case?
storyModule.kermanQuestion: Work with Kerman or refuse Kerman?

fallingSkies.title: FALLING SKIES
fallingSkies.body: Advance the main chain until the decisions that shape Terminal access and the endings become available.

armoredCase.title: RECOVER ARMORED CASE
armoredCase.body: Recover the Armored Case from the crashed plane in Woods. From here, handing it over or keeping it changes later costs, requirements and routes.

armoredChoices.prapor: OPTION: HAND IT OVER TO PRAPOR

keepPath.title: CONTAINER IN YOUR HANDS
keepPath.body: The Armored Case stays under your control. You avoid relying on Prapor early on, but that choice can make a later route far more expensive.

praporPath.connectionTitle: THE ARMORED CASE IS IN YOUR HANDS

lighthouse.label: Lighthouse
lighthouse.body: Find compromising material about Prapor on Lighthouse to open leverage against him.

access.label: Access requirement
access.body: Gain access to Lightkeeper. Network Provider 1 must be available.

bribe.label: Trade bribe
bribe.body: Talk to Lightkeeper and hand over three TerraGroup Blue Folders so he intervenes.

signal.label: Signal
signal.body: Fire a yellow flare in front of Ultra Mall on Interchange to mark the operation window.

raidCondition.label: Raid condition
raidCondition.body: Kill 15 targets without dying during that same raid. If you fail, you will need to repeat the execution.

pickup.label: Pickup
pickup.body: Collect the Armored Case from Lightkeeper. It is stored in the special slot and becomes central to the route again.

containerOpening.decryptBody: Find the Signal Jammer in LABS to continue the technical opening of the container.
containerOpening.completeBody: The internal blueprints are exposed and you can decide what to do with the critical information.

kermanChoices.noKerman: BRANCH: DO NOT WORK WITH KERMAN

noKerman.easyWayBody: Go to the port entrance, use the intercom and swipe the Keycard. This check confirms whether the direct exit is available.
noKerman.terminalBody: The card is rejected. Ask Prapor for help finding another way into Terminal.
noKerman.standby: System on standby. Open the help requirements to estimate the real cost of this branch.
noKerman.terminalPathBody: Go to Shoreline between 21:00 and 06:00, use the tower intercom and swipe the Keycard. Approach the Terminal gate without a weapon in your hands and begin your escape attempt.
noKerman.terminalRetry: If the attempt fails, you will need to buy a new note from Prapor for 5M roubles.

prapor.title: FEE: 300M ROUBLES
prapor.body: Prapor asks for 300M roubles if you gave him the Armored Case. In return, he gives you a note for Terminal soldiers.

keep.title: FEE: 500M ROUBLES + CONDITIONS
keep.body: Prapor asks for 500M roubles if you did not give him the Armored Case. He also demands timed tasks.
items: Find 4 TerraGroup Report Folders in LABS.
Give Prapor the Flash Drive with data.
Kill 50 targets in Streets of Tarkov.
Kill 4 PMCs and survive in a single raid.
keep.penalty: Penalty: these tasks must be completed in under 72 hours or you will need to hand over the Kappa container to progress. If completed in time, you earn the I Am Speed achievement.

labs.label: LABS infiltration
labs.body: Search for the Masterkeycard and RFID device in LABS.

mechanic.label: Mechanic help
mechanic.body: If the RFID is missing, talk to Mechanic and pay him 40 Bitcoins.

streets.label: Streets
streets.body: Get Elektroniks' key and go to his apartment on Streets to recover the RFID.

rfid.label: RFID card activation
rfid.body: Activate the RFID card from the Armored Case and swipe it at the port reader.

evidenceChoices.fullEvidence: OPTION A: GIVE ALL EVIDENCE TO KERMAN
evidenceChoices.lightkeeperTurn: OPTION A-2: GIVE 2 EVIDENCE ITEMS AND SIDE WITH LIGHTKEEPER
evidenceChoices.noEvidence: OPTION B: REFUSE TO HELP KERMAN

items: Build Intelligence Center level 3 in the Hideout.
Hand over all 8 Major Evidence items to Kerman.
Build Solar Power in the Hideout.
Craft the blank RFID in Intelligence Center level 3.
Final raid: Shoreline between 21:00 and 06:00, intercom, Keycard and Terminal gate unarmed.
Build Intelligence Center level 3 in the Hideout.
Give only 2 Major Evidence items to Kerman and cut ties.
Hand a special Flash Drive to Lightkeeper.
Kill 30 PMCs in Woods and hand over 100 PMC dogtags.
Locate Cultist Amulets in Marked Rooms.
Lightkeeper gives you the Terminal Keycard.
Final raid: Shoreline between 21:00 and 06:00, intercom, Keycard and unarmed gate approach.

history.prapor: Past actions: you gave the Armored Case to Prapor. He returns it after recovering it from Lightkeeper without extra penalties.
history.keep: Past actions: you did not give the Case to Prapor. He demands Repair Kits, a secure container and Military Components.

items: Do not hand over any evidence to Kerman.
Recover the briefcase with dangerous cargo and hand it to Prapor.
Prapor gives you a USB with Hash codes.
Build Solar Power in the Hideout.
Craft the blank RFID in Intelligence Center level 3.
Final raid: Shoreline between 21:00 and 06:00, intercom, Keycard and Terminal unarmed.

survivor.title: SURVIVOR ENDING
survivor.body: You ran hoping to escape, but the city burned behind you. You survived, though Tarkov was left in ashes.

savior.title: SAVIOR ENDING
savior.body: You escaped Tarkov for humanity. The strike against TerraGroup exposed its secrets and released the truth.

debtor.title: DEBTOR ENDING
debtor.body: You escaped Tarkov, but not yourself. You switched sides and remained tied to a debt that is hard to erase.

fallen.title: FALLEN ENDING
fallen.body: You escaped Tarkov only to fall into darkness. TerraGroup survived and the world began to crack.

fleaModule.title: Flea Market Tracker
fleaModule.subtitle: Dynamic price analysis, fluctuation charts and item profitability for PVP and PVE.

search.title: Hybrid search ({{mode}}) - English / Spanish without accents
search.empty: The requested item was not found in the {{mode}} market

hotDeals.title: Most fluctuating items in the {{mode}} market:

prestigeModule.title: Prestige
prestigeModule.subtitle: Requirements, rewards and a local checklist for preparing each prestige level. The prestige system is only available in PVP mode.
prestigeModule.summaryBody: {{done}} of {{total}} requirements marked. Required money is shown separately because it is not tracked automatically.
prestigeModule.noteBody: Requirements can change with patches. Base data was checked against the official Escape From Tarkov Wiki.

header.title: PMC Profile
header.subtitle: Profile connected to the public players.tarkov.dev JSON files. Only players already viewed on tarkov.dev/players appear, and the public index updates once per day.

errors.loadProfile: The PMC profile could not be loaded.
errors.enterUsername: Enter a Tarkov username to search.

achievements.title: Profile achievements
achievements.summary: {{visible}} visible out of {{total}} completed. Featured achievements show the most exclusive entries in the profile.

skills.title: Farmed skills
skills.summary: {{count}} skills detected in the public profile. Sorted by progress.

data.title: Available data
data.description: Tarkov.dev protects direct search with Turnstile, but publishes already viewed profiles as static JSON. Info Tarkov combines that profile with item/achievement catalogs to show a more useful sheet.

export.title: {{mode}} / INFOTARKOV PMC DOSSIER
export.imageFallback: External images could not be embedded in this export.
